title: PROTECT GARDEN 86601082 Slug & Snail Killer Max, 800G - Powerful Slug Killer Pellets - for Protecting Ornamental Plants and Garden Vegetables - Snail Repellant - Approved for Organic Gardening
features: SLUG REPELLENT: Powerful and effective slug and snail control to protect your garden, including fruit and vegetable crops
SUITABLE FOR: This slug and snail repellent can be used all year round on and around soil containing flowers, fruits, herbs, and vegetables
SOIL ENRICHING: Pellets naturally break down into iron and phosphate to enrich the soil around your plants, in turn helping them to grow
ORGANIC: Approved and certified for organic gardening by official body OF&G (Organic Farmers & Growers Association)
RAINFAST: Rainfast for up to 10 days after use, ensuring that the typical English weather doesn't wash away the pellets
description: From the manufacturer ORGANICALLY CERTIFIED Approved for organic gardening by OF&G, it can be used around ornamental and edible plants, as well as seedlings and young plants. RAINFAST FORMULATION Protect Garden Slug & Snail Killer Max also has a showerproof formulation which further protects your plants from rain for up to 14 days. WIDE COVERAGE Protects your plants by reducing the damaged caused by slugs and garden snails, with each pack treating areas up to 210sqm.
